sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51101" key="i)sonomiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσονομ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n51101.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">devoted to equality</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνήρ</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg030.perseus-grc1:561e" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">561e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
